BODYTEXT.Prew04: Now What? Find out what the next steps are here!
BODYTEXT.Prew05: Your little one is about 5mm long now – tiny but growing fast!
BODYTEXT.Prew06: Your baby's heart is a tiny poppy seed!
BODYTEXT.Prew07: You've grown a blueberry! Your little one is transforming into a mini human.
BODYTEXT.Prew08: Expect a growth spurt this week. Your baby could double in size!
BODYTEXT.Prew09: Did you know, babies start kicking soon after nine weeks!
BODYTEXT.Prew10: You may start to notice a little bump soon
BODYTEXT.Prew11: Your little one is already performing acrobatics 🤸
BODYTEXT.Prew12: Wave goodbye to the first trimester blues 🙌
BODYTEXT.Prew13: Your baby is roughly the size of a lemon 🍋
BODYTEXT.Prew14: You can now tell the sex of your baby from a scan!
BODYTEXT.Prew15: Your baby can hear you! Time to start those bedtime stories 💤
BODYTEXT.Prew16: At four months, your baby will sense if a bright light shines on your belly
BODYTEXT.Prew17: Your tiny tot is now around 140g and would snugly fit in your palm.
BODYTEXT.Prew18: Your baby is as big as an onion and is practising their gymnastics routine
BODYTEXT.Prew19: Can you feel the karate kid kicking away inside your belly?
BODYTEXT.Prew20: You're halfway to the finish line! 👶
BODYTEXT.Prew21: Your baby is busy making their first 💩
BODYTEXT.Prew22: Your baby is about the size of a sweet potato and weighs around 1 pound 🥔
BODYTEXT.Prew23: Your baby can now be startled by the sound of your sneezes!
BODYTEXT.Prew24: Your baby's face is fully formed, complete with eyelashes, eyebrows, and hair 👶
BODYTEXT.Prew25: Time to chat about your birth plan to your midwife
BODYTEXT.Prew27: Your baby is the size of a broccoli! 🥦
BODYTEXT.Prew28: Your partner might be able to hear an extra heartbeat by placing an ear on your bump!
BODYTEXT.Prew29: You're now burning an extra 900 kilojoules a day to grow that baby. Go you!
BODYTEXT.Prew30: Can't touch your toes? No stress! Why not host a little pedi-party with your pals?
BODYTEXT.Prew31: Your babies eyes can now tell light from dark!
BODYTEXT.Prew33: Your baby is the size of a pineapple! 🍍
BODYTEXT.Prew34: It's tine to prepare for your baby's arrival!
BODYTEXT.Prew35: Your baby is moving further down your pelvis, preparing for D-day.
BODYTEXT.Prew36: Your baby is bulking up, gaining about 1-2 lbs per week!
BODYTEXT.Prew37: Your baby is the size of a honeydew melon & ready to make their grand entrance
BODYTEXT.Prew38: Your baby has a firm grasp, ready to hold your hand for the first time ❤️
BODYTEXT.Prew39: You're likely consumed with thoughts about your impending arrival.
BODYTEXT.Prew40: If your little one is taking their sweet time, don't stress!
